description:
Stay in the heart of Santiago in a comfortable and bright room with a private bathroom. You'll be steps from the subway, museums, cafes, and cultural life, in a safe and vibrant neighborhood by day, yet quiet by night. We include breakfast and a home-cooked dinner for your convenience.

The space
Our apartment is on the 12th floor, with unobstructed views and shared spaces for you to enjoy: an equipped kitchen, a terrace, and a common room. The room has a queen bed (for 1 or 2 people), a ceiling fan, bed linens, and a private bathroom with hot water and toiletries.

With your reservation, you'll receive:

Breakfast (8:00–10:00) and dinner included.

Unlimited Wi-Fi and cable HDTV.

Access to a kitchen, refrigerator, and utensils.

Use of laundry facilities in the building (washers and dryers for a fee).

Maps, guidebooks, and many local recommendations.

My husband, Claudio, and I live with us and love hosting travelers from all over the world. We'll help you discover the city's authentic corners, from hidden cafes to the best nightlife.

The location is unbeatable: 10 minutes from the metro and steps from banks, supermarkets, restaurants, parks, and museums. Uber and public transportation are excellent in the area.

Guest access
WiFi, cable hdtv, laundry and dryer room in the building, ceiling fan in the bedroom, AC in the living room.

During your stay
We are vailable to talk and give advice to better understand the city and its people. We have a lot of information and tips about what locals do and love, so all you have to do is ask!

Other things to note
Private spaces for guests: bedroom and bathroom.
Common spaces shared with the hosts: living room, dining room and kitchen.

listing_name: Modern Studio with Amazing Views and Location
description:
We hope you’ll feel at home in our modern studio with stunning views in the heart of Las Condes. Enjoy a safe area with restaurants, supermarkets, cafés, and bars all within walking distance, plus excellent connectivity to Santiago by car and public transport. We're here to make your stay enjoyable—feel free to reach out with any questions!

The space
Stay in our top-floor studio in a modern building in the heart of Las Condes, a safe and vibrant neighborhood with excellent connectivity.

The studio features a private terrace with stunning views of the Andes mountains, a fully equipped kitchen, high-speed fiber optic internet, cable TV, and private parking. Designed for comfort, it also offers double-glazed windows for acoustic and thermal insulation, an eco-friendly heating system, and a low-noise fan for summer.

The building provides 24-hour concierge service, a gym, swimming pool, laundry facilities, and a rooftop barbecue area with panoramic views. Please note that some amenities, such as the laundry facilities and rooftop barbecue, may incur additional charges.

Features:

-Private parking

-High-speed WiFi

-Cable TV

-Terrace with mountain views

-Queen-sized bed and sofa bed

-Fully equipped kitchen (refrigerator, electric -oven, vitroceramic hob, microwave, electric -kettle, toaster)

-Integrated speaker system (including bathroom)

-Baby crib with sheets (on request)

Guest access
The location offers unbeatable convenience for exploring Santiago. Metro stations and bus stops are just a short walk away, along with restaurants, cafés, bars, and supermarkets. For those traveling by car, we provide free private parking on the premises exclusively for our guests.

The building has 24-hour concierge service, and we offer self-check-in with a secure lockbox and code for easy key retrieval at your convenience.

Other things to note
Some amenities, such as the rooftop BBQ and washing machines, are not free of charge. Guests can reserve the BBQ in advance at the concierge, where tokens for the washing machines can also be purchased.

There is no parking, but there is paid parking a few blocks away.

The space
It is a small, cozy apartment (studio) with everything you need to have an excellent stay in Santiago.

Guest access
The apartment is completely for you. You cannot share it with other guests.
In the building, there are common areas that you can use on the 26th floor, such as the pool (available from December to March, and in maintenance every Monday), the gazebo you can rent for barbecues (visitors are not allowed). Other things to note
Access to the apartment is from 2:00 pm and after that you can arrive at any time you want, because we will leave the keys in a lock with a key, which you could access when you need it, even at dawn.
Smoking inside the apartment is prohibited.

description:
We are a family who has for rent a nice and cozy appartment with capacity for four people.
It's located on a fourth floor in the very historic heart of downtown Santiago, only a couple of blocks away from subway.

The space
We are a family who has for rent a nice and cozy appartment with capcity for four people. It's located on a fourth floor in the very historic heart of downtown Santiago, only a couple of blocks away from Cal y Canto and Santa Ana subway stations. At a very close distance you will find the Central Market, La Moneda Palace (seat of the Executive government), the Main church, the Santa Lucía Hill as well the recently refurbished Court House Palace, among other places of interest.

You can also enjoy the Barrio Bellavista, visit the unique home of our Nobel Prize Pablo Neruda and taste the exquisite and varied gastronomy of the many restaurants that exist in the sector.
You should also visit at the end of Bellavista Park and the Metropolitan Zoo with its funicular that takes you to the top and gives you a panoramic view of the great Santiago.

The apartment is fully furnished, has 2 bedrooms, walking closet, a bathroom, living room, American kitchen, gas hob with electric oven, and all the equipment necessary to have a pleasant stay.

The master bedroom has a comfortable double bed and the second room has a bunk bed with two beds.

You can also enjoy a pleasant furnished terrace overlooking an inner plaza. You will have white towels and some toiletries.

It also has Wi-Fi (inside the apartment and in the building) and a Smart TV.

Guest access
Regarding the building itself, it has an event room –that must be booked in advance, a gymnasium, a game room for adults and children, a laundry on the 25th. floor with 25 drying machines, as well as concierges 24/7, taking care of the entrance and exit of the residents, as well as of the safety of the building.

listing_name: Beautiful View & Safe Stay in Vibrant Lastarria.
description:
Stay in the heart of Santiago in this comfortable apartment located in the iconic Lastarria neighborhood, one of the city’s most vibrant cultural districts. Set on a charming pedestrian boulevard, you’ll be steps from top restaurants, cafés, museums, and galleries. The apartment offers a beautiful city view, is 100% electric and safe, and features 800 Mbps symmetrical high-speed internet, perfect for remote work or streaming. Walking distance to Cerro Santa Lucía and Parque Forestal.

The space
Impeccable and bright fully equipped studio, perfect for a comfortable stay for up to two guests. Its smart layout allows the space to be divided into two separate areas, offering both functionality and comfort during your stay.
The apartment is 100% electric, providing an extra level of safety since there are no carbon monoxide emissions.
Bedroom
The apartment features a comfortable double bed and a full bathroom located outside the bedroom area. It includes a sound-insulated window that helps block outside noise and heating in the bedroom for a cozy atmosphere year-round. A desk and chair are also available, ideal for remote work.
Kitchen
A fully equipped open kitchen with electric stove, oven, and microwave, perfect for preparing your favorite meals.
Living area
A bright and welcoming living space with two large double-pane windows that reduce outside noise while offering beautiful views of Lastarria and José Ramón Gutiérrez streets, San Cristóbal Hill, and the GAM Cultural Center. The living room includes heating and a Smart TV with internet access for your entertainment.
High-speed internet
The apartment features 800 Mbps symmetrical fiber-optic internet, perfect for remote work, video calls, and uninterrupted streaming.
Security and building amenities
The building offers 24/7 reception and security, ensuring a safe and comfortable stay. Parking and laundry facilities are also available in the building for an additional fee.
Prime location
The apartment is located just steps from Santiago’s Metro Lines 1 and 5, as well as multiple public transportation options along Alameda (Libertador Bernardo O’Higgins Avenue), the city’s main avenue.

Guest access

listing_name: Apartment in Barrio Brasil Centro de Santiago
description:
Santiago from the Heart of the Brasil Neighborhood

Discover the magic of Santiago by staying in a modern and equipped apartment for two, located steps from the emblematic Plaza Brasil. Immerse yourself in the rich history, enjoy the vibrant bohemian life with restaurants, cafes and cultural spaces at your fingertips. Easily connect with the city thanks to the subway. It has 24x7 concierge, high-speed Wi-Fi and all the amenities you need for an unforgettable stay.

The space
Our apartment is located in the heart of the Barrio Brasil, an iconic place known for its rich history and vibrant bohemian life. Upon entering, you will find a bright and cozy space, designed with a modern touch that combines comfort and style.

Master bedroom: It has a high-quality double bed, fresh bedding and a large closet for your belongings. The windows are properly insulated to ensure quiet nights of rest.

Living room: A relaxing corner with a comfortable sofa, perfect for resting after a day exploring Santiago. Enjoy your favorite show on the HDTV.

Kitchen: Our kitchen is equipped with everything you need to prepare your meals.

Bathroom: Functional and clean, with a tub to soak and relax. We provide fresh towels and basic toiletries for your comfort.

For cold days, the apartment has electric heating through a radiator, ensuring that you always feel warm and comfortable. In addition, the building offers 24-hour concierge service, providing you with security and peace of mind during your stay. And of course, high-speed Wi-Fi is available for all your connection needs.

Guest access
Guests will have full and private access to the entire apartment, including:

Master bedroom: Where you can rest peacefully in a double bed with quality bedding.

Living room: An ideal space to relax, read or watch TV.

Kitchen: Although small, it is fully equipped so you can prepare your favorite meals and drinks.

Bathroom: With all the necessary amenities, from the tub to basic toiletries.

In addition, you can use the electric radiator to keep the apartment warm on cold days.

The space
The 50-square-meter apartment has everything you need for a comfortable stay (full kitchen, equipped bathrooms). It is bright and cozy, the construction is modern and the spaces are well used.

Guest access
The entire apartment is available for guests.
The laundry is on the top floor of the building and has an extra cost that is detailed in the HOUSE GUIDE.
There is no free parking included but the building has a public parking lot that is detailed in the HOW TO GET AROUND section.

Other things to note
Santiago's climate has 4 very marked seasons and little rain. From November to March it's very hot and it's almost no rain, the maximum reaches 34°celcius. From April to early June the temperatures drop and the rains increase, it gets more windy and it can get hot or cold in a matter of hours. Between June and August it is very cold, it does not snow but in the evenings the temperatures are close to 0°C and in the day the sun doesn't get very hot, it rains every one or two weeks. In September, spring is here, and the weather gets better, but there's always some ice cold and a rain behind it until October.
It is necessary to be attentive to the weather to see what clothes they will bring. The apartment has electric stoves and is not particularly cold in winter, and fans for summer.

CHECK-IN/OUT: Check-in time to the apartments is 3:00 PM and must be vacated by 11:45 AM on the day of your Check-Out. After that time, management will be entitled to charge an extra fee based on the current rate.

- The access card is personal and you keep it until the end of your stay. Do not leave it at the front desk.

OTHERS: Any damage caused by guests to the property, personal property or objects, will be their sole
responsibility, and you must pay for their repair or replacement.

No pets inside the apartment.

ROOMS ARE NON-SMOKING (LAW 20.660) A $100 fine for not following this rule.

description:
In the historic center of Santiago, close to the Museum of Fine Arts and Metro stations.
This newly remodeled and functionally designed apartment offers all the amenities you need for an unforgettable stay.
Its unbeatable location near the Museum of Fine Arts and a few minutes from the Metro stations makes it easy to get around on foot or by public transport to the city's main tourist attractions, restaurants and cultural centers.

The space
Prime location:
- Steps away from Bellas Artes, Santa Lucia and Plaza de Armas Metro.
- Museums, parks, restaurants and cafes within walking distance.
- Perfect for getting to know Santiago's history and culture in depth.

Comfortable and well-equipped space:
- Studio apartment with everything you need for a stay.
- Comfortable bed and quality bedding.
- Heater that keeps the atmosphere warm in winter.
- Fan to cool off on hot days.
- Functional kitchen with induction stove, electric oven, kettle and basic utensils, ideal for saving on meals or preparing homemade dishes.
- Bathroom with hot water shower and essential hygiene items (shampoo, soap, etc.).

Small, big details:
- Kitchen condiments, cleaning supplies, and other extras are available to make your stay easier (such as reusable bags and adapters).

Consider before booking:
- Washer and dryer available in the building, but it is a shared service and at an additional cost.
- Being in the center, the environment can be more bustling than usual (sirens, traffic, etc.). We have installed good quality windows to mitigate noise, but if you are very sensitive, consider wearing earplugs.
- During the day, most travelers feel very comfortable walking around the area. At night, as in most urban centers, it is advisable to be attentive to your belongings and use authorized transportation, if you are concerned about safety.
- No A/C.

We look forward to seeing you with everything ready for you to have a better experience in Santiago!

Please don't hesitate to contact us if you have any questions or special requests; we will do our best to help you have a comfortable and pleasant stay.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire apartment during your stay. These spaces are for completely private use, so you can enjoy every corner with peace of mind.

There is a restricted section in the closet that is closed. Please do not attempt to open.

In the building, there is a shared laundry area (washer and dryer), available at an additional cost. If you wish to use this service, please check with the front desk staff.

There are no additional common areas within the building enabled for guests.

listing_name: A quiet space. Perfect for working.
description:
Places of interest: the center of the city, parks, public transportation, art and culture. You are going to love my space because of the coziness, the location and the people. My accommodation is good for couples, business travelers and friends. It ideal if you are traveling with friends, you can stay in my Apartment and feel safe, it has surveillance and concierge 24 hours a day.

The space
Stay in our beautiful and recently renovated apartment, in the heart of downtown Santiago, close to historical and tourist attractions, next to Parque Forestal, as well as close to excellent restaurants, pubs, and cafes. The building is of modern architecture, with laundry facilities on the top floor.

The apartment has an interior view with natural sunlight. The entire floor has been replaced with ceramic tiles and the walls have been completely polished.

The unit has easy access from 2 elevators to the floor where it is located. The building is next to Parque Forestal, which is the lung of Santiago and a place to relax. The apartment has natural light during the day, which offers views of the city and has the benefit of being a quiet space, an oasis in the heart of downtown Santiago.

Access to the apartment is easy, as it is located only 2 blocks from the Plaza de Armas subway station, as well as 2 blocks from Parque Forestal. The building is located on a street with few vehicles, which also makes it easy to reach by cab.

The space is characterized by its open concept, with living-dining room and kitchen separated by a counter. The bedroom is separated by a door. The light fills every space of the apartment, but does not give the sun directly, even so, the apartment has black out curtains that allow complete darkness for a good rest.

In the bedroom there is a comfortable double bed. The bathroom with bathtub has a shower, with good hot water pressure. We provide clean sheets and towels for your stay, and the apartment has a hairdryer. The kitchen is fully equipped, with a natural gas stove top from Callería, a refrigerator with separate freezer, and extractor fan, as well as other items such as microwave oven, electric oven, electric kettle, juicer, coffee maker for coffee beans, among others.

Guest access
Travelers will have access to all the units of the Apartment, as kitchen so they can prepare their own meals. Close to the building there are several restaurants Peruvians, supermarkets. There is a laundry facility in the common area of the building.

listing_name: Best Location and Design - Central to Everything
description:
We recently purchased and meticulously renovated this unbeatable central 1 bedroom apartment in safe and modern doorman building. The location is only half a block from the Santa Lucía metro station, and the charming Santa Lucía Park. We are on a semi-pedestrian street with small markets and cafés, and an easy walk to great restaurants & shopping, and Santiago's top tourist attractions.

The space
The unit has a nicely furnished living room, with floor-to-ceiling sliding-glass doors, that open to a balcony with city-views. The aesthetic is comfortable modern, with design accents from our travels in Chile. As both Airbnb hosts and travelers, we strive to make this the most comfortable space for our visitors.

The bedroom has a comfortable queen-size bed, with a large picture window. Sitting on the bed, you have a view of the city and, in the distance the snow-covered 5000 meter Andes peaks. The en-suite bathroom has a shower/tub combo and a vanity with granite countertop. We provide fresh linens and towels, and the building has a great hot-water system.

The fully-equipped kitchen features granite counters, ceramic electric glass stove, a spacious Daewoo refrigerator and freezer, and stainless steel stove and exhaust fan. In addition the kitchen area has a small dining table, microwave oven, and a Nespresso espresso machine.

For the winter months of June to September, we provide an move-able electric room heater with thermostat control. While Santiago's winters are typically mild, winter night temperatures can sometimes reach 32 to 36 Fahrenheit (0-2 Celsius). The heater is able to keep a room comfortable at a set temperature.

The apartment has high-speed cable internet with wifi. In the living room is a 43 inch 4K LG LED television. It features a digital tuner for crystal-clear images of Chilean HD broadcast TV, and also access to unlimited Netflix movies and several international smartTV channels. Additionally the unit has a 20 watt bluetooth speaker, able to connect to a smartphone, tablet, etc..

Guest access
We offer a fully furnished one-bedroom apartment in a modern high-rise residential building. The apartment is exclusively for the primary guest and one additional guest under the same reservation. You will have the entire space to yourself, with no need to share it with anyone else.

The bedroom features a large closet available for your full use.

Check-in is self-service, facilitated by the building’s 24-hour doorman. The apartment is accessed via a personalized code for the smart lock, eliminating the need for keys. This unique code is programmed specifically for your stay.

The building also offers shared amenities, as outlined below, which are available to our guests.

BUILDING LOBBY ACCESS

The building features a main lobby with a 24-hour doorman desk. Access to this lobby is provided by the doorman on duty, with typically two doormen on duty at all times, ensuring access is never an issue.

POOL ACCESS

The building features a small plunge pool in its 3rd-floor outdoor courtyard, available as a shared amenity for residents and guests staying at the apartment. It’s a great way to relax and refresh on a summer day, with the pool season typically running from December to March.

While Santiago enjoys a pleasant Mediterranean climate, it does experience all four seasons, and the building management does not open the pool during the cooler months outside of this period. Mondays are maintenance days for the pool, so it is closed on that day. Otherwise, it is typically open from 10 a.m. to 8 p.m. during the season. However, the hours may change if the building management needs to perform maintenance.

Please note that the building management operates the pool, and we are not responsible if it is closed for unscheduled maintenance, though they are usually diligent about keeping it open during the season. If the pool amenity is crucial for your stay, feel free to reach out before making your reservation, and we can confirm its availability for you.

BUILDING SELF-SERVICE LAUNDRY

The building has a self-service, coin-operated laundromat. This laundry room features several modern commercial washers and dryers, available for use by both residents and guests staying in our apartment.

Please note that the machines require exact change in 500-peso or 100-peso coins, and you will need to bring your own laundry detergent. Alternatively, you can pay using an app, but please note that the app only works with credit or debit cards issued by Chilean banks. The laundromat is reasonably priced and offers great value. For the latest costs, feel free to reach out to us or check with the doorman during your stay.

PARKING

The apartment does not include an assigned parking space, and the building does not offer free parking. There is limited paid parking available in the building's underground garage, subject to availability. If you need parking, please reach out ahead of time, as it is sometimes possible to secure one for an additional cost of 8,000 pesos per night.

Other things to note
We offer a beautiful and comfortable space to enjoy the heart of Santiago Centro. Please feel most welcome to stay!

Our listing is instant booking enabled (for guests with prior positive reviews on the Airbnb platform), and also available through booking requests (for first time Airbnb guests).

The space is strictly non-smoking.

HOUSE RULES

Here is a summary of our main house rules:

- Check-in: After 4:00 PM
- Checkout: 10:00 AM
- Self check-in via smart lock keypad
- Not suitable for children and infants
- No smoking
- No pets
- No parties, meetings, or events

EARLY CHECK-IN REQUESTS

Subject to availability, and for an additional cost of CLP 5000 pesos, it is possible to request an early check-in starting at 2:00 pm. If you would like this option, please let us know as soon as possible after making the reservation. Otherwise, due to the high demand, it is unlikely we will be able to accommodate last-minute.

If you have an international morning flight arrival, and you would also need a morning check-in, it is necessary to book the night prior to your arrival date, as we cannot otherwise guarantee an early check-in

LATE CHECKOUT REQUESTS

Subject to availability, and for an additional cost of CLP 5000 pesos, it is possible to request a late checkout at 12 noon (at the latest). If you would like this option, please let us know as soon as possible after making the reservation. Otherwise, due to the high demand, it is unlikely we will be able to accommodate last-minute.

If you have a late afternoon/evening flight, and would like to depart from the apartment after 12 noon, it is necessary to add an additional night to the reservation. To be able to prepare, clean and sanitize the apartment for the next guest, we do not otherwise have additional flexibility.

BAGGAGE STORAGE NOT AVAILABLE

Please note, per the policy of the building’s management, the building's doorman is not permitted to store bags. Additionally, to comply with current cleaning protocols, it is not possible to leave your bags with the cleaners prior to check-in, or after checkout.

PORTABLE AIR CONDITIONER

The apartment includes a portable air conditioner, providing a practical way to cool the space on warmer days. Unlike a fixed system such as a split unit, this portable unit is movable, allowing you to place it where it’s needed most. However, please note that it is less efficient than a permanent system and requires a simple setup: the warm air exhaust hose must be securely attached and directed through a slightly open window.

We kindly ask you to handle the air conditioner and its exhaust hose with care so that it remains in excellent condition for all our guests. Detailed instructions for setup and use will be available in the house manual, accessible after booking. You’ll also find a QR code in our digital guidebook in the apartment for easy reference.

To view a photo of the portable air conditioner, please check the Photo Tour section of this listing.

Santiago’s Mediterranean climate generally offers pleasant summer temperatures with low humidity. However, on particularly hot days, the portable air conditioner can add extra comfort to your stay.
